raw_consumer_statement: Had XXXX balance on my Wayfair card on XX/XX/2022 I ordered a artificial tree, as soon as I received it I called the company to return it because it was nothing like the picture it was horrible. They received the tree XX/XX/2022 atXXXX, tracking number is XXXX. They refuse to refund my money, the tree was {$300.00} my card is over {$500.00} now and they are sending it to the credit bureau! I can't believe I am going through this for a year they just don't care and say I have to pay even though they know they have the tree!! I hope you can please help me, I only bought this tree was because my husband passed away and had know one to bring me a real one and they know this and every time I call them they say they are sorry they will take care of it and then they do nothing and I get a bill with more charges on it...
